name: Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple, peeled, cored and sliced about 1/8 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the first two ingredients together in a 9-inch square cake pan by placing the pan with the ingredients into the oven as it is preheating.
3. While the ingredients are melting, mix the next four ingredients together and then mix them into the melted butter and sweetener. Lay apple slices in the syrup to completely cover the bottom of the cake pan in an attractive way (you may need more than one apple if you use a small one).
4. Fill a 1-cup measuring cup with pitted dates, but do not pack the dates into the cup. With the dates in the cup, fill the cup with water, then pour both dates and water into a blender. Add 1/2 cup more water into the blender. Blend until it forms a smooth, thick paste.
5. Add the 1/4 cup butter or margarine to the blender and blend until totally whipped.
6. Pour the blender mixture into a mixing bowl and add the last five dry ingredients. Mix just long enough to thoroughly blend all the dry ingredients.
7. Pour this batter on top of apple slices and spread evenly in the cake pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the middle of the cake comes out clean. When done, remove from oven and immediately turn the cake pan upside down to empty onto a serving platter.
